Mapping Digital Nudges and Recommender Systems for Obesity Prevention: Scoping Review 数字助推与推荐系统在肥胖预防中的映射：范围综述

Sarah Forberger, Lucia A Reisch, Pieter Van Gorp, Christoph Stahl, Lara Christianson, Jihan Halimi, Karina Karolina De Santis, Chungwan Lo, Cassandra A Omane, Alejandra Loyola-Leyva, Laurent Malisoux, Tiziana de-Magistris, Torsten Bohn

Interactive Journal of Medical Research (2026)

recommender systems lifestyle physical activity sedentary behavior obesity prevention digital health digital intervention digital nudges

Digital tools that subtly steer healthier eating and activity choices could transform obesity prevention—if researchers can overcome current fragmentation. 能够微妙引导更健康饮食和活动选择的数字工具可能会改变肥胖预防——如果研究人员能够克服当前的碎片化问题。

Problem 研究问题

Despite growing use of recommender systems and digital nudges in other domains, their application to nutrition, physical activity, and sedentary behavior for obesity prevention remains poorly mapped and rarely combined. 尽管推荐系统和数字助推在其他领域使用日益增多，但它们在营养、身体活动和久坐行为以预防肥胖方面的应用仍缺乏系统映射，且很少结合使用。

Approach 研究方法

A PRISMA-ScR-compliant scoping review systematically mapped 68 articles reporting 94 real-world user evaluations of these technologies. 符合PRISMA-ScR的范围综述系统性地映射了68篇文章，这些文章报告了94项针对这些技术的真实世界用户评估。

Significance 研究意义

The review reveals both the promise and the methodological gaps that must be addressed before these scalable digital interventions can reliably support population-level obesity prevention and sustainable behavior change. 该综述揭示了这些可扩展数字干预在可靠支持人群层面肥胖预防和可持续行为改变之前所具有的潜力以及必须解决的方法学差距。

Key Results 主要成果

  • 79% of studies targeted nutrition; only 32% addressed physical activity79%的研究针对营养；仅32%涉及身体活动
  • 68 of 94 evaluations showed positive outcomes, but heterogeneity prevents meta-analysis94项评估中有68项显示积极结果，但异质性阻止了荟萃分析
  • Research concentrated in high-income countries with limited target-group specification研究集中在高收入国家，目标群体指定有限

Abstract 摘要

Background: Recommender systems are pivotal in organizing information to enhance noticeability, reduce overload, and streamline decision-making. They can be even more effective if combined with digital nudges. Digital nudging is a subtle approach that combines design, information, and interaction elements to create a choice architecture that can guide user behavior in digital environments. While promising in many fields, there is a notable gap in health promotion, particularly because digital nudges and recommender systems can encourage and support sustained healthier choices in nutrition, physical activity (PA), and sedentary behavior reduction to prevent overweight and obesity. Objective: This scoping review addresses these gaps by exploring how digital nudges and recommender systems are used in obesity prevention. Methods: We prospectively published the scoping review protocol and adhered to the PRISMA-ScR guidelines. Eligibility was defined using the PCC framework. We searched 7 bibliographic databases up to October 2023. Following a 2-stage screening by independent reviewers, we selected 68 articles that included 94 user evaluations. Results: Most articles (36/68, 53%) report on recommender systems focused on nutrition, with fewer (16/68, 23%) aiming to promote PA. Most studies on digital nudges (11/68, 16%) targeted nutrition-related nudges. Approaches to item retrieval vary widely. Sixty-eight evaluations report positive results, while 26 studies report mixed, negative, or no-difference results. Conclusions: Integrating digital nudges and recommender systems might hold potential in overweight and obesity prevention. However, the heterogeneity in study designs, outcome measures, and reporting quality limits the comparability of findings. 背景：推荐系统在组织信息以增强可注意性、减少过载和简化决策方面至关重要。如果与数字助推相结合，它们可能更加有效。数字助推是一种微妙的方法，结合设计、信息和交互元素来创建选择架构，从而在数字环境中引导用户行为。尽管在许多领域前景广阔，但在健康促进方面存在显著差距，特别是因为数字助推和推荐系统可以鼓励和支持在营养、身体活动（PA）和减少久坐行为方面做出更健康的持续选择，以预防超重和肥胖。 目的：本范围综述通过探索数字助推和推荐系统如何用于肥胖预防来填补这些空白。 方法：我们前瞻性地发表了范围综述方案，并遵守PRISMA-ScR指南。使用PCC框架定义资格。我们检索了截至2023年10月的7个文献数据库。经过独立评审者的两阶段筛选，我们选择了68篇文章，其中包含94项用户评估。 结果：大多数文章（36/68，53%）报告了针对营养的推荐系统，较少（16/68，23%）旨在促进身体活动。大多数数字助推研究（11/68，16%）针对与营养相关的助推。项目检索方法差异很大。68项评估报告了积极结果，而26项研究报告了混合、负面或无差异结果。 结论：整合数字助推和推荐系统可能在超重和肥胖预防中具有潜力。然而，研究设计、结局测量和报告质量的异质性限制了研究结果的可比性。

Background and Rationale 背景与理由 problem

Recommender systems predict and suggest items based on user preferences while digital nudges use interface design to subtly influence choices. The review identifies a gap in applying these tools to obesity prevention through nutrition, physical activity, and sedentary behavior reduction. 推荐系统根据用户偏好预测并建议项目，而数字助推则利用界面设计微妙地影响选择。该综述指出了将这些工具应用于通过营养、身体活动和减少久坐行为来预防肥胖的空白。

  • Recommender systems reduce information overload and support decision-making推荐系统减少信息过载并支持决策
  • Digital nudges provide choice architecture in digital environments数字助推在数字环境中提供选择架构
  • Limited research combines both approaches for health promotion将两种方法结合用于健康促进的研究有限

Scoping Review Methods 范围综述方法 method

Following PRISMA-ScR guidelines and a published protocol, the review searched seven databases up to October 2023. Eligibility used the PCC framework, screening 2064 records to include 68 articles with 94 user evaluations. 遵循PRISMA-ScR指南和已发表的方案，该综述检索了截至2023年10月的七个数据库。使用PCC框架确定资格，筛选2064条记录后纳入68篇文章，包含94项用户评估。

  • PCC framework for eligibilityPCC框架用于资格判定
  • Two-stage independent screening两阶段独立筛选
  • Focus on real-world user evaluations only仅关注真实世界用户评估

Characteristics of Included Studies 纳入研究特征 result

The 68 articles predominantly addressed nutrition (79%), with fewer targeting physical activity. Recommender systems were reported in 76% of articles and digital nudges in 16%. Most research originated from high-income countries. 68篇文章主要针对营养（79%），较少针对身体活动。76%的文章报告了推荐系统，16%报告了数字助推。大多数研究来自高收入国家。

  • Nutrition focus dominates (54/68 articles)营养焦点占主导（54/68篇文章）
  • Geographic bias toward high-income countries地理偏向高收入国家
  • High heterogeneity in methods and reporting方法和报告高度异质

Key Findings and Gaps 主要发现与差距 discussion

Positive results were reported in 68 of 94 evaluations, but heterogeneity prevents firm conclusions on effectiveness. Major gaps include lack of target group specification, limited geographic diversity, and insufficient integration of nudges with recommender systems. 94项评估中有68项报告了积极结果，但异质性阻止了对有效性的确切结论。主要差距包括缺乏目标群体指定、地理多样性有限以及助推与推荐系统的整合不足。

  • Personalization common but interconnection rare个性化常见但互连罕见
  • Small sample sizes and short intervention durations样本量小且干预持续时间短
  • Need for interdisciplinary collaboration and real-world trials需要跨学科合作和真实世界试验
